task: Phase 2 hardening (deferred from Tier 1 ralph). 5 stories: 5-arch binary distribution + install.sh, 38 hand-curated fixture pinning, parser-drift fuzzer, 88 manifest spec assertions, observability meta envelope. Estimated 12-17 hours total. Order matters: US-101 (binaries) foundation, US-102+US-103+US-104 testing infra parallel-safe, US-105 telemetry last.

stories.title: 5-arch helper binary distribution + install.sh OS/arch detection
acceptanceCriteria: bun run build:all 성공 — 5개 outputs: bin/axhub-helpers-darwin-arm64, darwin-amd64, linux-amd64, linux-arm64, windows-amd64.exe
각 binary 파일 크기 < 120MB (sanity, bun runtime overhead 고려), 각각 실행 가능 (file 명령어로 architecture 확인)

bin/install.sh 작성 (executable, POSIX shell): uname -s + uname -m으로 OS+arch 감지 후 ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/bin/axhub-helpers symlink 생성. macOS arm64 → axhub-helpers-darwin-arm64, Linux x86_64 → axhub-helpers-linux-amd64 등. unsupported arch → exit 1 with Korean error message
hooks.json + commands/*.md에서 ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/bin/axhub-helpers 그대로 (install.sh가 symlink 처리)
PostInstall hook이 install.sh 자동 실행 (또는 README에 manual 1-step 명시)
tests/install.test.sh: install.sh의 OS/arch detection을 4가지 mock 환경에서 실행 (uname mock) — 4 PASS expected

stories.title: 88 manifest spec assertions (Phase 6 plugin-validator regen + actual loader test)
acceptanceCriteria: tests/manifest.test.ts 작성. 88개 이상 단위 assertion (describe block 단위 카운트, expect 카운트 88+)

Coverage: plugin.json schema (15+ assertions: required keys, repository as string not object, version semver, license, etc), hooks.json structure (10+: outer wrapper, hookEventName presence in hookSpecificOutput, valid event names, command shape), commands/*.md frontmatter (10+: argument-hint optional, allowed-tools optional, description required), skills/*/SKILL.md frontmatter (15+: name + description only, no allowed-tools, length limits), agent definitions if any, marketplace.json (10+ if exists), CLAUDE.md/AGENTS.md presence
Test failures from real bug history: hookEventName missing → fail, repository as object → fail, allowed-tools in skill → fail (Phase 6 actual incidents)
bun test → 추가된 manifest test 모두 PASS, 기존 93 tests 유지 (총 181+)
tests/manifest.test.ts 문서: 각 describe block 위에 'Reason: <Phase 6 incident X>' 주석

stories.title: Parser-drift fuzzer for parseAxhubCommand defense-in-depth
acceptanceCriteria: tests/fuzz-parser.ts 작성. 1000+ randomized destructive variant generator: env-prefix (FOO=bar axhub deploy create), sub-shell ($(axhub deploy create)), eval (eval axhub deploy create), &&-chain (true && axhub deploy create), ;-chain, parens, backticks, quote escapes (axhub "deploy" "create"), tab/whitespace insertion, Unicode equivalents
Each generated variant of a destructive base command MUST produce: parseAxhubCommand(variant).is_destructive === true (or action defined). 0 false negatives across 1000 iterations
Reproducibility: bun run fuzz [seed] — same seed = same variants. Default seed = 0xAxHub42 or similar
package.json scripts: 'fuzz': 'bun tests/fuzz-parser.ts'
Run output: '1000/1000 variants caught' or list of bypasses (must be 0)
Add to smoke:full: bun run fuzz with deterministic seed

stories.title: 38 hand-curated fixture pinning (anti-regression frozen test set)
acceptanceCriteria: tests/fixtures/ directory with 38 .json files. Each fixture name: <category>-<id>.json (e.g., destructive-001-deploy-create.json, ro-005-apps-list.json, adv-008-env-prefix.json, uni-002-cyrillic-homoglyph.json, prf-001-bare-axhub.json, hdl-001-codespaces-detect.json)
Categories distribution: 10 destructive, 8 read-only, 8 adversarial, 4 unicode, 4 profile/headless, 4 negative (false-positive checks)
Each fixture schema: { input: { utterance, command? }, expected: { is_destructive, action?, app_id?, branch?, commit_sha?, profile?, exit_code_class? } }
tests/fixtures.test.ts 작성: glob tests/fixtures/*.json, for each fixture run parseAxhubCommand (or full pipeline) and assert deep-equal against expected
Frozen: any change to expected output requires explicit fixture update (forces a conscious 'we are changing semantics' moment)
Documentation: tests/fixtures/README.md explains curation methodology, categories, and update protocol

stories.title: Observability meta envelope (opt-in telemetry to ${XDG_STATE_HOME}/axhub-plugin/usage.jsonl)
acceptanceCriteria: src/axhub-helpers/telemetry.ts 작성: emitMetaEnvelope({event, ...payload}) — wraps payload with {ts: ISO8601 UTC, session_id: $CLAUDE_SESSION_ID, plugin_version: '0.1.0', cli_version: <axhub --version>, helper_version: '0.1.0', event, ...payload}
Opt-in only: AXHUB_TELEMETRY=1 environment variable required. Default disabled (no writes, no env reads beyond gate).
Write target: ${XDG_STATE_HOME:-$HOME/.local/state}/axhub-plugin/usage.jsonl (append, one JSON line per event, mode 0600 like consent files)
Wrap key emissions: cmdSessionStart, cmdPreauthCheck (decisions deny/allow), cmdConsentMint (mint result), cmdClassifyExit (exit code class). Helper internal only — skill prose untouched.

tests/telemetry.test.ts: 6+ assertions — opt-out default (no writes when AXHUB_TELEMETRY unset), opt-in writes (when AXHUB_TELEMETRY=1), envelope shape, file mode 0600, append (not overwrite), JSON-per-line format
skills/deploy/references/telemetry.md (NEW): documents opt-in flag + envelope schema + privacy guarantee (no PII, no command args echoed verbatim, only event types + counts + version metadata)

metadata.task_origin: /oh-my-claudecode:ralph 페이즈2 진행해 — Phase 2 hardening from Tier 1 deferred backlog
metadata.phase_3_deferred: Marketplace publish prep (cosign signing, goreleaser), first-customer pilot (1 company × 5 vibe coders × 1 week), real ax-hub-cli staging E2E, codegen catalog→markdown sync (architect M1 §3), expected_cmd_pattern on T-RO rows (architect M2.5 §3)
